title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: gnome-shell-extensions bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for gnome-shell-extensions is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: GNOME Shell extensions allow for modifying the default GNOME Shell interface and its parts, such as window management and application launching. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Workspace names are not visible without the mouse hover movement. [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-96219)  dash-to-panel crashes with initial monitor power-up (JIRA:RHEL-110378)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian

fixes.description: dash-to-panel crashes with initial monitor power-up

full_text:
An update for gnome-shell-extensions is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

GNOME Shell extensions allow for modifying the default GNOME Shell interface and its parts, such as window management and application launching. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Workspace names are not visible without the mouse hover movement. [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-96219)  dash-to-panel crashes with initial monitor power-up (JIRA:RHEL-110378)
